name: obvhs
description: Compressed Wide BVH (CWBVH) for WebGPU — high-performance BVH construction via WASM and GPU traversal shaders

scripts.build:lib: BUILD_MODE=lib vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && node scripts/copy-wasm.js
scripts.build:lib:win: set BUILD_MODE=lib&& vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && node scripts/copy-wasm.js
scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('dist/obvhs.js')){console.error('ERROR: dist/ not found. Run npm run build:lib:win first.');process.exit(1)}; if(!fs.existsSync('src/wasm/pkg/obvhs_wasm_bg.wasm')){console.error('ERROR: WASM not found. Run npm run build:wasm first.');process.exit(1)}"
